segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hey, have you tried that new meditation app? Yep, it's been about a week now and I feel less stressed, which is the point. I could use a little less stress in my life. What else is good about this app? The guided sessions are easy to follow. The daily reminders are a bit annoying though. I'll and give it a try.
